print.office_address_full: Head Office: Office No. 210, 2nd Floor, Opp. Devi Annapurna Niwas Co-op. Housing Society Ltd., Plot No. 8, Sector-18, Vashi, Navi Mumbai - 400705.
print.repay_message: I/We hereby apply for a Personal Loan of ₹ {{amount}} (Rupees {{akshari}} only). I will repay this loan along with interest within {{period}} months. The first installment will be paid after {{first}} months and subsequent installments on the {{date}}th of every month. The purpose of my loan is
print.declaration: I am providing all my basic information as follows. I am married/unmarried, and {{count}} family members are dependent on me. I also declare on oath that I do not have any other bank loan from any other cooperative society. I will repay my loan as decided by the Board of Directors with interest and other charges as applicable to the society from time to time. I agree to abide by all existing and future rules and by-laws of the society.
print.guarantor_doc: I am providing the names and information of society members who are ready to stand as guarantors for me along with other required information with this application.
print.humbly_request: It is humbly requested that the Board of Directors consider my loan application.
print.as_guarantor_decl: All the above information is true and correct, and I am ready to stand as a guarantor of my own free will.
rules: Interest will be charged from the date of loan disbursement. Interest will be calculated on the Reducing Balance Amount on a daily basis (Per Day Interest).

The first loan installment (principal + interest) must be deposited within 30 days from the date of loan disbursement. Each subsequent loan installment must be deposited within 30 days, and if delayed, the said installment will be considered overdue and penal interest will be charged at 2% per annum.

If the borrower's loan installment is deposited by cheque through salary deduction from the company, the installment will not be considered deposited until the cheque is received by the society. It will be the responsibility of the concerned company and the borrower to send/bring the cheque to the society regularly.

The society reserved the right to demand one-time repayment of the loan for the following reasons:
a) Non-utilization of the loan amount for the approved purpose.
b) Default in three consecutive installments for any reason.
c) Conviction/punishment of the applicant/guarantor by the court.
d) Death of the borrower/guarantor.
e) Submission of false information or false documents.
Guarantors must ensure that the borrower is repaying the loan installments regularly.

If the borrower fails to pay installments regularly, the said installments will have to be paid by the guarantors individually/collectively. Therefore, they should stand as guarantor only for familiar persons where they are prepared to pay the loan installments.

In case of default, for loan recovery, the residence and job/business location of the borrower and guarantors will be visited, notices will be issued, and their names will be published on the society's notice board and in newspapers. The borrower and guarantors will be solely responsible for any damage caused by such unpleasant action.
Guarantors cannot escape the responsibility of loan repayment by claiming they did not receive the default notice.
Each guarantor will be responsible for the entire loan, not proportionally.
In case of loan default, the deposits of the borrower and guarantors with the society will not be refunded.
The society has the right to file a claim and recover the dues against the borrower and guarantors as per the M.S.S.A. rules and other laws for loan recovery.
Any change in the residence/job/business address after loan approval must be promptly communicated to the society by the borrower and guarantors.
